profiles.name: 阿姆布烏爾

characteristics.$text: 每當 an 敵方單位 被選擇進行射擊 or fight, after it has finished making its attacks, if one or more of those attacks targeted 此模型 and 此模型 is not destroyed, 此模型 can fight as if it were the 近戰階段
characteristics.name: 說明

profiles.name: 夫爾艾恩茲伊

characteristics.$text:
Twice per battle, at the end of your opponent’s turn, if 此模型 is not within Engagement 射程 of one or more 敵方單位, you can remove 此模型 from the battlefield. In the Reinforcements step of your next 移動階段, set it up anywhere on the battlefield that
is 超過 9 吋 horizontally away from all 敵方模型. If the battle ends and 此單位 is not on the battlefield, it 被摧毀. 

Designer’s Note: Place two Borewyrm Infestation tokens next to 此模型, removing one 每當 this ability has been used.
characteristics.name: 說明

characteristics.$text:
每當 此模型 makes a ranged attack that targets the closest 敵方單位:
- 若該 attack is made with a Punisher gatling cannon and the target is not a MONSTER or VEHICLE, add 1 to the 命中擲骰.
- 若該 attack is made with a battle cannon and the target is a MONSTER or VEHICLE, add 1 to the 命中擲骰.
- 若該 attack is made with a quad-lascannon and the target can FLY, add 1 to the 命中擲骰.
characteristics.name: 說明

布爾伊奇恩格 爾奧布奧特

characteristics.$text:
When the bearer 被摧毀 (other than through triggering its bomb, as described below), 擲一顆 D6 before removing it from play: 結果為 6 時 it explodes, and each other unit 3 吋內 of and visible to the bearer suffers 1 點致命傷.

In your 指揮階段, the bearer can trigger its bombs. If it does:
- Open each Hatchway that is 3 吋內 of the bearer. Your opponent cannot attempt to prevent those Hatchways from opening, and those Hatchways cannot be closed again.
- 擲骰 one D6 for each other unit 3 吋內 of and visible to the bearer: on a 2+, 該單位 suffers 1 點致命傷. The bearer is then destroyed.
characteristics.name: 說明

profiles.name: 布奧姆布 克伊特

selectionEntries.name: 布奧姆布 克伊特

characteristics.$text: 每當 the bearer ends a Normal move, you can open one Hatchway that is within 1" of it. Your opponent cannot attempt to prevent that Hatchway from opening.

characteristics.$text: When this FORTIFICATION is first set up on the battlefield, each gate section can be set up with its gate open or closed. In your 指揮階段, you can open or close the gate of each of 此模型’s gate sections. While a gate is open, models can move and draw line of sight through it as if it were not there.
